title: The Wife That Didnt Know Who She Married
original_title: The Wife That Didn't Know Who She Married
overview: Searching in the wrong places for love, Tessa finds herself quickly marrying Xavier. In a short amount of time, Tessa finds out everything her newly wedded husband told her was a complete lie. Now she's left to put together pieces of the puzzle to figure out who it is that she really married.
